nodes.label: AuroraCraft Management Script
nodes.rationale: The management script uses PM2 for process management and ensures PostgreSQL is running before starting the backend. It provides interactive menu, health checks, and boot auto-start via crontab.

nodes.label: AgentDefinition Interface
nodes.rationale: Updating instructionsPrompt is documented as the best way to shape agent behavior; it is inserted after each user input. The handleSteps generator enables programmatic stepping with tool calls, STEP, STEP_ALL, or return.

nodes.label: Firecrawl MCP Integration
nodes.rationale: Firecrawl MCP is a paid-only feature registered dynamically via OpenCode's HTTP API after instance starts, rather than being configured in opencode.json, to prevent Unrecognized key: mcpServers validation errors.

nodes.label: Per-User Linux Isolation
nodes.rationale: Each registered user gets a Linux system user (auroracraft-{username}) for file and process isolation. The server must run as root, or the auroracraft user must have passwordless sudo for adduser, userdel, chmod, chown, and runuser.

nodes.label: API Key Per-Project Isolation
nodes.rationale: Provider API keys are never stored in the workspace tree; they are isolated per-project to prevent exposure through the code editor. Real provider config lives in /var/lib/auroracraft/configs with 600 permissions.

nodes.label: Shared Dependency Caches
nodes.rationale: 777 permissions on shared caches is the simplest correct solution because each user runs as their own UID. A group-based approach would require a shared auroracraft group and sg on every runuser call, which is fragile.

nodes.label: Drizzle Journal
nodes.rationale: Tracks applied migrations in order; omits 0004_add_coderabbit, 0005_add_visibility, and 0010_github_oauth.

nodes.label: KiroProcessManager
nodes.rationale: Creates and chowns project directories via sudo before spawning kiro-cli so the file watcher starts on an existing tree. Uses --resume to continue the most recent session. Implements graceful SIGTERM and force SIGKILL cancellation with a 5-second grace period.

nodes.label: SSEConnection
nodes.rationale: Buffers up to 500 non-terminal events per session so late-joining browser tabs replay deltas and unfreeze the UI. Schedules a 30-second debounced complete on idle, cancelled if a new step starts. Auto-approves permission.updated events to prevent tool calls from blocking.

nodes.label: OpenCodeBridge
nodes.rationale: Auto-approves all permission requests so tool calls are not blocked. Uses a 30-minute execution timeout and a 30-second debounced idle-complete timer with pollUntilIdle fallback. Strips thinking and DeepSeek think tags from final output to prevent duplicate rendering. Flushes pending text into ordered segments to preserve file-op badge ordering.

nodes.label: OpenCodeProcessManager
nodes.rationale: Isolates per-project config directories outside the workspace tree so each project gets its own HOME, credentials, and opencode db. Spawns opencode via runuser -l as the project owner to avoid git dubious-ownership errors. Implements a 45-second hard startup timeout to guarantee hung startups cannot deadlock the bridge permanently.

nodes.label: KiroBridge
nodes.rationale: Uses KiroFileWatcher for accurate file change detection instead of parsing stdout metadata. Streams stdout through KiroStreamFilter to suppress metadata lines and PTY token artifacts. Emits events through the bridge-agnostic SessionEventBus so the SSE endpoint does not need to know which bridge produced them.

nodes.label: SessionEventBus
nodes.rationale: Bridge-agnostic event bus that buffers non-terminal StreamEvents for late-joining listeners. Emits complete only live (never buffered) so reconnecting clients still get a terminal signal. Auto-cleans buffers 60 seconds after the last listener leaves to prevent unbounded memory growth.

nodes.label: KiroFileWatcher
nodes.rationale: Takes an initial snapshot before spawning the CLI and performs a final diff after stopping to catch all file changes. Debounces rapid fs events (editors often trigger multiple writes). Ignores build artifacts and hidden directories (.git, node_modules, .gradle, target, etc.).

nodes.label: agentRoutes
nodes.rationale: Enforces token-based billing: estimates cost, checks balance, deducts tokens before sending prompt. Writes minimal project-level config (no secrets) into the workspace and full provider config (with API key) to an isolated per-project directory with 600 perms to prevent key extraction via the code editor. Restarts the OpenCode instance when the provider changes. Supports Zen auth for higher rate limits on opencode models.

nodes.label: adminRoutes
nodes.rationale: Downgrading a user from paid to free is blocked if paid-only provider API keys remain. Admin can grant tokens, manage per-user provider keys, and check Kiro CLI auth status via filesystem existence checks.

nodes.label: githubRoutes
nodes.rationale: All git operations run via runuser as the project owner to avoid dubious-ownership errors. For push, temporarily injects the OAuth token into the remote URL, then resets it afterward. Clone for private repos uses the stored GitHub access token.

nodes.label: coderabbitRoutes
nodes.rationale: Runs CodeRabbit review in a detached background child process so the HTTP request returns immediately. Parses JSON stdout/stderr for structured findings and errors (rate limits, git errors, auth errors). Marks previous pending reviews as superseded to avoid multiple active reviews. Cleans up cache 30 seconds after completion.

nodes.label: authRoutes
nodes.rationale: Registers users with Zod validation, creates a system user and home directory via createSystemUser, falling back to mkdir on failure. Session cookies are httpOnly with lax sameSite and a 7-day maxAge. Login checks both username and email.

nodes.label: projectRoutes
nodes.rationale: Creates projects with a random linkId (slug + hex), initializes a git repo with an empty .gitkeep commit, and fixes ownership. On delete, triggers OpenCode cleanup before filesystem removal. Enforces path traversal checks on all file operations (resolve + startsWith). Supports ZIP upload and GitHub cloning.

hyperedges.label: Kiro CLI execution and file change detection pipeline
